Notes.Text:
This update for firewalld fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2026-4948: local unprivileged users can modify the runtime firewall state without proper authentication due to
  D-Bus setter mis-authorizations (bsc#1260903).

Vulnerabilities.Description: A flaw was found in firewalld. A local unprivileged user can exploit this vulnerability by mis-authorizing two runtime D-Bus (Desktop Bus) setters, setZoneSettings2 and setPolicySettings. This mis-authorization allows the user to modify the runtime firewall state without proper authentication, leading to unauthorized changes in network security configurations.
